I'm focused on defining the project scope, leaning towards a "planty-style" React SPA for allergen identification. I've nailed down the core features: single email-based accounts, unlimited profiles (Name + Allergy), profile toggling, and profile grouping functionality.

I've been solidifying the technical specifications. The frontend will be React 18 with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, while AI logic leverages the Gemini API. I'm going with a simulated barcode/vision approach using Gemini's multimodal capabilities, given the web sandbox limitations. The project structure is starting to come together as well.

I'm structuring the application now, with `App.tsx` handling navigation and state. I've defined interfaces for key data in `types.ts`. I also have a `geminiService.ts` file for AI logic.
I'm implementing a "planty" theme with soft greens, rounded corners, natural icons, and ample whitespace and using Lucide-react for the icons.
